title: Multi-target evaluation of Korean herbal compounds against the tyrosinase / TYRP1 / DCT axis for topical hyperpigmentation: Boltz-2 cofold, ChEMBL-anchored ranking, ADMET-AI 107-endpoint safety panel, and 30 ns molecular dynamics validation of oxyresveratrol and curcumin leads
prior_history: ChemRxiv rejected 2026-04-30 (scope mismatch, curator letter); bioRxiv rejected 2026-04-28 as BIORXIV/2026/721241 ('not a complete research paper, just a screening report'); reframed in v0.3 emphasizing 4 analytical layers (Boltz-2 cofold + ChEMBL pIC50 anchor + 30 ns MD + ADMET-AI 107-endpoint) and resubmitted 2026-05-03.
